description: Use this API to remove a participating three-winding transformer winding from a specified OPF interface flow constraint in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = purge_opf_intflw_3wt(ifid, eibus, ejbus, ekbus, cktid)
python_syntax: ierr = purge_opf_intflw_3wt(ifid, eibus, ejbus, ekbus, cktid)

parameters.name: ifid
parameters.description: Interface flow identifier. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: eibus
parameters.description: From bus number the value of eibus indicates the from bus of the winding to be removed from the flow constraint. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ejbus
parameters.description: To bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ekbus
parameters.description: Third bus number. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: specified three-winding transformer does not exist.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
